instructions: Ensure the connectivity check avoids excessive timeouts or fork/exec overhead. Limit the connection timeout of the HTTP request to prevent the CI pipeline from hanging.
Ensure the format of the test output is clear, readable, and includes actionable '💡 How to fix:' instructions if mirrors are unreachable to reduce developer cognitive load on failure.
Verify that the parsing of the mirrorlist safely reads the file line-by-line without executing its contents or introducing command injection vulnerabilities.
